parameters.content:
## FTAP AI Chatbot PoC
POST from .NET MAUI to `/webhook-test/ftap-faq-chat` while testing or `/webhook/ftap-faq-chat` after activation.

Payload: `{ "message": "What is the iAMS PIN code?", "sessionId": "demo-1" }`.

Final answers are returned exactly from the extracted PDF FAQ. OpenAI can be used for route/grounding metadata when `OPENAI_API_KEY` is set.
